detection.title: CMS Detection
detection.description: Quickly identify the technologies used by your targets. Analyze up to 10 URLs at once or upload a file to speed up your investigations.
detection.formDescription: Paste your URLs (one per line) or import a file to start the analysis. We normalize the links automatically.
detection.protocolHint: URLs without protocol are converted to https:// automatically
detection.accessDeniedDescription: CMS detection is available starting from the Basic plan. Upgrade to unlock this advanced feature.
detection.overviewDescription: Monitor your plan and the latest activity from your analyses.
detection.historyEmpty: History will populate after your analyses.
detection.resultsDescription: Analysis of submitted URLs and detected CMS.

detection.historyDescription: Track previous analyses and quickly find detected CMS.
